General Video.description: Clean common SFX for any video: whooshes, soft impacts, transitions, stings, atmospheres.

Animals / Wildlife Documentary.description: Wildlife, animals, nature ambience, water, tension, soft cinematic movement.

Documentary / Explainer.description: Professional documentary stings, soft transitions, low hits and atmosphere.

Cars / Engineering.description: Clean cinematic movement, impacts, pulses and transitions for engineering/car videos.

Business / Wealth.description: Subtle, non-irritating business SFX: soft clicks, stings, transitions and warm atmosphere.

Horror / Mystery.description: Controlled dark drones, tension risers, low impacts and suspense transitions.

Action / Trailer.description: Trailer-style hits, risers, deep whooshes and pulses without harsh beeping.

Nature / Travel.description: Nature, water, soft sweeps and calm atmosphere.
